viewsWelcome.lsdynaIncludeTree.contents:
Welcome to LS-DYNA Include Tree!
[Scan Include Tree](command:extension.scanIncludeTree)
To get started, open an LS-DYNA file (`.k`, `.key`, `.dyna`) and click the scan button.
viewsWelcome.lsdynaKeywordIndex.contents:
Welcome to LS-DYNA Keyword Index!
[Scan Keyword Index](command:extension.scanKeywordIndex)
To get started, open an LS-DYNA file (`.k`, `.key`, `.dyna`) and click the scan button.

config.manualsDir.description: Path to the directory containing LS-DYNA PDF manuals (absolute or relative to VS Code installation dir). On Windows, copy SumatraPDF.exe into this folder for precise page navigation.
config.language.description: Select the UI and Hover language for the extension.
config.additionalExtensions.description: Additional file extensions to associate with the LS-DYNA language.
config.scanner.fullScanLargeFiles.markdo:
Whether to perform a full scan on all files for Include Tree and Keyword indexing. When disabled, files larger than 500KB will only have their first and last 1000 lines scanned for massive performance improvements. 

> **WARNING:** Enabling this will cause very long wait times when loading projects with giant mesh files!
config.ignoreFormattingKeywords.descript: Keywords or prefixes that should ignore automatic formatting, smart tab alignment, and comment auto-completion.
config.customValidKeywords.description: Custom valid keywords that should not be marked as errors. Keywords can include the leading asterisk (e.g., '*END'). You can also use a wildcard at the end (e.g., '*MAT_*') to match any keyword starting with that prefix.
config.enableTabNavigation.description: Enable smart Tab navigation and overwriting cell selection in LS-DYNA cards. When disabled, Tab inserts spaces/tabs normally.
config.autoFormat.description: Control when auto-formatting of LS-DYNA card lines occurs.
config.autoFormat.enumDescriptions.onBlu: Format current line automatically when cursor leaves it
